features: WARM AND ROMANTIC: High quality material and candle shape combines together makes the tea light looks just like real candles. Displace traditional candles, the candle shape light offers you warm and bright while reduce risks. You can put the battery tea lights on table or other places in restaurants, home and garden wedding,which can create a romantic and Warm atmosphere

USE WITH CONFIDENCE: Battery powered tea lights can be used without having to worry of flame, no fire hazards or burning risks, safe for families with pet or young child. can be used in Halloween Decorations, Halloween Party, Tabletop, Mantle, and more bedrooms, lounges, dens, bathrooms

BATTERY OPERATED: The electronic tea lights come with AG10 batteries which is very efficient and easy to buy online or from local store. can offer about 100 hours of light-time and can be replaced easily via the tab at the bottom

EASY OPERATION: Toggle switch button to turn on/off the lamps, one key operation. The tea light shell made of transparent plastic that will be more shining for different scene decoration. The wick led will flickering as like real tea light

WIDELY USED: The warm yellow flameless LED tea lights provide the effect of an actual candle. Flameless Candles to Create a Warm Ambiances, They are perfect for marriage proposals, engagements, wedding decorations, anniversaries, dancing parties, evening gatherings, and other festive decorations
description: These flameless LED tea lights offer the charm of real candles with none of the dangers. Crafted from translucent plastic, their flickering wick effect and warm amber glow create a cozy atmosphere for weddings, dinners, or Halloween décor. Powered by AG10 batteries (included, About 100-hour lifespan), they feature a simple on/off switch and easy battery replacement. Safe around children and pets, they’re perfect for adorning tables, mantles, or outdoor spaces where open flames are risky. Lightweight and reusable, they elevate any occasion—from proposals to holiday gatherings—with effortless, worry-free elegance. Characteristics: 1.Realistic LED tea lights mimic flickering flames safely, ideal for homes with kids/pets or events like weddings/Halloween. 2.Battery-operated (AG10, About 100-hour runtime) with easy toggle switch and replaceable batteries for hassle-free use. 3.Durable plastic construction with warm amber glow creates romantic ambiance without fire risks. 4.Versatile for table settings, parties, or décor in bathrooms, gardens, and festive celebrations.
